task_completion.description: Create a new component category named 'Server Memory'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a category named 'Server Memory' with the type 'Component' in the Categories list, or visible as an option in a category dropdown menu.

task_completion.description: Register the Samsung 32GB DDR4-3200 ECC RDIMM component with correct details
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Samsung 32GB DDR4-3200 ECC RDIMM' in the Components list or its details page, showing Total Quantity: 16, Minimum Quantity: 4, Cost: 89.99, and Location: Austin DC.

task_completion.description: Register the Kingston 64GB DDR5-4800 ECC RDIMM component with correct details
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Kingston 64GB DDR5-4800 ECC RDIMM' in the Components list or its details page, showing Total Quantity: 8, Minimum Quantity: 2, Cost: 199.50, and Location: Austin DC.

task_completion.description: Check out 2 units of the Samsung component to asset SVR-UPG-001
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a checkout confirmation, history log, or the component's checked-out status showing 2 units of the Samsung component assigned to the asset 'SVR-UPG-001'.

task_completion.description: Check out 1 unit of the Kingston component to asset SVR-UPG-002
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a checkout confirmation, history log, or the component's checked-out status showing 1 unit of the Kingston component assigned to the asset 'SVR-UPG-002'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Snipe-IT web application in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not just write the details in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The information should be entered into the actual Snipe-IT forms, not a text editor or note-taking app.

integrity.description: Checkout was performed using the application's checkout functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Snipe-IT checkout form or success messages generated by the application, rather than manually edited HTML or fake UI.
